general_description: A line of compact, uninterruptible power supply (UPS) devices designed for indoor use. These power banks are used to provide backup power for small electronics during outages, ensuring continuous operation.

products.design_type: Wall-plug adapter with integrated power cord
products.description: Base model mini UPS suitable for keeping essential low-power devices running during brief power interruptions.

products.design_type: Wall-plug adapter with integrated power cord
products.description: Highly popular mid-tier model with increased battery capacity for longer backup endurance. A highly rated seller with over 10,000 units sold.

products.design_type: Wall-plug adapter with integrated power cord
products.description: High-capacity adapter-style UPS for extended power backup needs, ideal for continuous security camera or router operation.

products.design_type: Desktop block unit with integrated ports (12V DC)
products.description: Large capacity indoor UPS designed for maximum backup power. Features a different desktop form factor with dedicated ports rather than a wall-plug design.
